expectations.text: The audit identifies and names the machine-readable encoding file (lib/operate/mode-features.ts) as part of the triangulation.
expectations.evidence: _originals/mode-features.ts is copied but the agent didn't explicitly call out its role as triangulation source. The READMEs and HANDOFF-NOTES focus on what's missing for the designer (CSS rendering, paths, scope) rather than what exists structurally.

expectations.text: The audit explicitly assesses whether the existing README's designer handoff section is sufficient for a cold-read designer.
expectations.evidence: HANDOFF-NOTES.md 'Findings' section explicitly identifies 3 blockers: won't render in browser, README leaks internal context (absolute paths, internal plan refs), no engagement scope. Built ENGAGEMENT-SCOPE.md to address.
